== Notes for [[Item:Q100693|Q100693]] ==

Was born in Moslem Spain, before christian Reconquista

---------------------------------------

http://www.geni.com/projects/The-Ibn-Yahya-Family/1798

http://www.jewishencyclopedia.com/articles/15051-yahya

http://www.jewishgen.org/Rabbinic/journal/descent.htm

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD88096E1EFBBFA9822EF79916C185F
geni:6000000026483478390

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
